page_content:
JWST498 Advanced Language Module for Jewish Studies (1-3 Credits) A supplementary language module for students enrolled in designated Jewish Studies classes. Language of instruction English, texts in original language. Prerequisite: HEBR212 or JWST282; or permission of ARHU-Meyerhoff Program & Center for Jewish Studies.

JWST499 Independent Study in Jewish Studies (1-3 Credits) Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Meyerhoff Program & Center for Jewish Studies. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
